sqlMap.select: SELECT A.*, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.id ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ','),'') AS videoattachments, GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.fileName ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosname, GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.fileallName ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosallname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft2.addTime,'') ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosaddtime FROM (SELECT rt.id,rt.personnelid,rt.conflictdetails,rt.riskappeal,rt.validflag,rt.addoperator,rt.addtime,rt.updateoperator,rt.updatetime,rt.memo,rt.videoattachments AS old_videoattachments, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.id ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ','),'') AS fileattachments, GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft1.addTime,'') ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS filesaddtime FROM p_wen_risk_t rt LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id,rt.fileattachments) WHERE rt.validflag =2 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY rt.id ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT 1) A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft2.id,A.old_videoattachments) GROUP BY A.id
SELECT COUNT(rt.id) FROM p_wen_risk_t rt WHERE rt.validflag >0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$

SELECT A.*, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.id ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ','),'') AS videoattachments, GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.fileName ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosname, GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.fileallName ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosallname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft2.addTime,'') ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosaddtime FROM (SELECT rt.id,rt.personnelid,rt.conflictdetails,rt.riskappeal,rt.validflag,rt.addoperator,rt.addtime,rt.updateoperator,rt.updatetime,rt.memo,rt.videoattachments AS old_videoattachments, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.id ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ','),'') AS fileattachments, GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft1.addTime,'') ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS filesaddtime FROM p_wen_risk_t rt LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id,rt.fileattachments) WHERE rt.validflag >0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY rt.id) A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft2.id,A.old_videoattachments) GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY A.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_wen_risk_t (personnelid,conflictdetails,riskappeal, fileattachments,videoattachments, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$conflictdetails$','$riskappeal$', '$fileattachments$','$videoattachments$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_wen_risk_t SET validflag=$validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.*, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.id ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ','),'') AS videoattachments, GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.fileName ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosname, GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.fileallName ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosallname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft2.addTime,'') ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosaddtime FROM (SELECT rt.id,rt.personnelid,rt.conflictdetails,rt.riskappeal,rt.validflag,rt.addoperator,rt.addtime,rt.updateoperator,rt.updatetime,rt.memo,rt.videoattachments AS old_videoattachments, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.id ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ','),'') AS fileattachments, GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft1.addTime,'') ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS filesaddtime FROM zfw_p_wen_risk_t rt LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id,rt.fileattachments) WHERE rt.validflag =2 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY rt.id ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT 1) A LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft2.id,A.old_videoattachments) GROUP BY A.id
SELECT COUNT(rt.id) FROM zfw_p_wen_risk_t rt WHERE rt.validflag >0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$

SELECT A.*, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.id ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ','),'') AS videoattachments, GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.fileName ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosname, GROUP_CONCAT(ft2.fileallName ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosallname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft2.addTime,'') ORDER BY ft2.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS videosaddtime FROM (SELECT rt.id,rt.personnelid,rt.conflictdetails,rt.riskappeal,rt.validflag,rt.addoperator,rt.addtime,rt.updateoperator,rt.updatetime,rt.memo,rt.videoattachments AS old_videoattachments, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.id ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ','),'') AS fileattachments, GROUP_CONCAT(ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft1.addTime,'') ORDER BY ft1.id desc SEPARATOR ',') AS filesaddtime FROM zfw_p_wen_risk_t rt LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id,rt.fileattachments) WHERE rt.validflag >0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ GROUP BY rt.id) A LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft2.id,A.old_videoattachments) GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY A.id desc
